summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; import java.util.Objects; public class SystemStateHolder { private SystemState currentState = SystemState.INIT; public SystemStateHolder() { } public SystemState getState() { return currentState; } void applyTransition(TransitionToken token, SystemState newState) { Objects.requireNonNull(token, "TransitionToken is mandatory for state changes"); Objects.requireNonNull(newState, "Target SystemState cannot be null"); currentState = newState; } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
